title: The Boy Who Found Wonder
setting: A mysterious forest adjacent to his backyard

scenes.text: One sunny afternoon, Timmy decided to explore the woods behind his house. He stepped into the whispering trees, his heart pounding with excitement and a little fear. Almost immediately, he stumbled upon a tiny, trembling creature. It was Whiskers, a baby rabbit.
scenes.image_description: Timmy discovering Whiskers under dappled sunlight

scenes.text: Timmy carefully picked up Whiskers and whispered soothing words into his new friend's ear. He noticed a small trail leading deeper into the woods. With Whiskers snuggled in his arms, Timmy followed the path. They discovered a hidden glade filled with vibrant flowers.
scenes.image_description: Timmy and Whiskers walking hand-in-hand among colorful wildflowers

scenes.text: Suddenly, a magnificent creature emerged from behind a tree - it was a unicorn! Timmy couldn't believe his eyes. The unicorn bowed its head gently towards Whiskers, who hopped happily onto its back. Then, it turned to Timmy and winked.
scenes.image_description: A magical unicorn appearing among the trees
